turns.content: Hello!

Hi there! Welcome to AccessBank's support chat 👋 I'm here to help you with a wide range of services - whether it's questions about your cards, loans, transfers, or the mobile app. I can also help you report issues or create support cases. What can I help you with today?
Salam!

Salam! AccessBank-ın dəstək xidmətinə xoş gəlmisiniz 👋 Kart xidmətləri, kreditlər, köçürmələr, mobil tətbiq və hesab açılışı barədə hər cür sualınıza cavab verməyə hazıram. Sizə necə kömək edə bilərəm?
Привет
Привет! Добро пожаловать в чат поддержки AccessBank 👋 Я могу помочь вам с вопросами по картам, кредитам, переводам, мобильному приложению и не только. Расскажите, чем могу быть полезен?
Debit card

Great choice! Here's what AccessBank's debit cards have to offer 🎉

✅ **Instant access** to your money at 2,000+ ATMs across Azerbaijan
✅ **Contactless NFC** payments - just tap and go
✅ **Real-time notifications** for every transaction via the app
✅ **Free internal transfers** between AccessBank accounts
✅ Available as Visa Electron, Visa Classic, or Mastercard Standard

Annual fee is just 10 AZN, and your card is ready in 3-5 business days. Want to know how to apply, or do you have a specific question about your card?
Loans

AccessBank has several loan options designed for different needs:

✅ **Cash loan**: 500-50,000 AZN, 6-48 months, annual rate from 9.5% to 24%, annuity repayment
✅ **myCard credit / loan card**: up to 10,000 AZN, 36 months, grace period up to 50 days, 0% commission costs
✅ **Secured loan**: 10,000-70,000 AZN, backed by real estate, term up to 59 months
✅ **Lombard loan**: 200-100,000 AZN, backed by gold jewelry, term up to 48 months

Final terms depend on income, workplace, credit history and bank assessment. Would you like the cash loan, card loan, secured loan or lombard loan details?

description: Exploratory - user types 'Mobile app' in Russian

turns.content: Мобильное приложение

Мобильное приложение AccessBank - это ваш банк в кармане! 📱

✅ Проверяйте баланс и историю операций в любое время
✅ Переводы на карты любых банков Азербайджана и за рубеж
✅ Оплата коммунальных услуг, интернета и мобильного за несколько секунд
✅ Управление картами: блокировка, установка лимитов
✅ Вход по отпечатку пальца или Face ID
✅ Уведомления о каждой операции в реальном времени

Доступно бесплатно в App Store и Google Play. Есть вопросы по регистрации или использованию приложения?
Credit card

AccessBank's myCard credit / loan card gives you flexible access to funds:

✅ Limit up to **10,000 AZN**
✅ Term: **36 months**
✅ Annual interest: **24%-26%**
✅ Grace period: **up to 50 days** for card payments
✅ 0% commission costs
✅ Cashback may be available through AccessQazanc

Eligibility usually requires an ID and official salary, and the bank may request extra documents after review. What would you like to know more about?
What's the minimum monthly payment?

For the current myCard credit / loan card, AccessBank highlights a grace period of up to 50 days and card account tracking through myAccess. The exact minimum payment can depend on the contract and tariff package, so check your agreement in myAccess or call *8880 before the due date.
What are your branch working hours?

AccessBank's service network page lists **40 branches**, **52 ATMs** and **1 department** across Baku, Absheron and many regions of Azerbaijan. Exact branch working hours can vary by branch, so the safest option is to check the branch page on accessbank.az or call *8880 before visiting.

The bank's official address is 3 Tbilisi Avenue, Yasamal district, Baku city.
My card has been blocked
I'm sorry to hear that! To help you better, could you tell me when you first noticed the card was blocked, and whether you received any notification about it?
It happened this morning, no notification. Card ending 5521.

Thank you. I've created support case **CASE-A1B2C3D4** and escalated it to our **Card Operations** team. They will review your case and contact you within 1-2 business days. For immediate help, you can also call *8880 to speak with a specialist directly. Please save your case ID for reference.
I sent a transfer yesterday but the money hasn't arrived yet
I understand how worrying that can be. Could you confirm whether this was a transfer to another AccessBank account or to a different bank? And do you have the transaction reference number?
It was to Kapital Bank, reference number TXN-88921, amount was 500 AZN.

Thank you for the details. I've created support case **CASE-D4E5F6G7** and escalated it to our **Transfers & Payments** team. Domestic transfers can take up to 1 business day, but since it's been over 24 hours I've flagged this for urgent review. They'll contact you within 1-2 business days. You can also call *8880 for immediate assistance.
How can I check my loan application status?

You can check your loan application status in three ways:

1. **Mobile app** - go to 'My Applications' in the menu
2. **Internet banking** - log in at ibank.accessbank.az
3. **Hotline** - call *8880 (free, 24/7)

Statuses you might see: Under Review, Additional Documents Required, Approved, Rejected, or Disbursed. If additional documents are needed, you'll receive an SMS notification. Is there anything else I can help you with?

description: OTP not received - digital banking issue

turns.content: I'm not receiving the OTP to log in to the app

Sorry to hear that! A few things to check first: make sure the phone number receiving the SMS is the one registered with AccessBank, and that SMS isn't blocked on your device. OTPs expire after 3 minutes, so try requesting a new one.

If the issue continues, is it possible your registered phone number has changed?
Yes I changed my number recently

That's likely the cause. To update your registered phone number, you'll need to visit a branch in person with your Azerbaijani ID (Vin-kart) - this can't be done remotely for security reasons. I've created a support case **CASE-G7H8I9J0** with our **Digital Banking** team who can also guide you through the process. You can also call *8880 for immediate help.
What interest rates do you offer on deposits?

AccessBank currently offers several deposit products:

**Term Deposit**
- From 50 AZN or USD
- 6-24 months
- Up to 10.75% in AZN or up to 3.5% in USD
- Interest can be paid monthly or at maturity

**myGoal Deposit** supports top-ups and terms up to 36 months.
**Instant Deposit** and **Flexi Deposit** are designed for more flexible use, including top-ups and access to funds depending on product rules.

Rates can change, so please confirm the exact rate before opening.
Transfers

AccessBank makes sending money fast, simple, and affordable! 💸

✅ **Internal transfers** (between AccessBank accounts): instant and always free
✅ **Domestic transfers** to other Azerbaijani banks: 0.5% fee, delivered in 1 business day
✅ **International SWIFT** transfers to 100+ countries: 1% fee, 2-5 business days
✅ **Utility payments**: completely free via the app
✅ Daily limit up to 20,000 AZN for premium accounts

What would you like to know more about?
How much is the fee for sending 1000 AZN to another bank?

For a domestic interbank transfer of 1,000 AZN, the fee is **0.5%**, which equals **5 AZN**. The minimum fee is 0.50 AZN and the maximum is 10 AZN, so for 1,000 AZN you'd pay exactly 5 AZN. The transfer is processed within 1 business day.
I lost my card! What should I do?

Don't worry - act quickly and your money will be safe. Here's what to do right now:

1. **Call *8880 immediately** (free, 24/7) to block the card - this is the fastest option
2. OR open the AccessBank mobile app → Card Settings → Block Card

Once blocked, no transactions can be made. A replacement card costs 10 AZN and is issued within 3-5 business days. If you believe any fraudulent transactions occurred, please visit a branch with your ID to file a dispute. Is there anything else I can help you with?
İpoteka krediti haqqında məlumat almaq istəyirəm

AccessBank ipoteka kreditləri evinizin sahibi olmanızı asanlaşdırır! 🏠

✅ **Kredit məbləği**: 10.000 - 200.000 AZN
✅ **Müddət**: 20 ilə qədər
✅ **İllik faiz**: 12%-dən başlayaraq
✅ **İlkin ödəniş**: əmlakın dəyərinin minimum 20%-i
✅ **MIDA** dövlət subsidiyalı ipoteka proqramı da mövcuddur

Lazımi sənədlər: Azərbaycan ID (Vin-kart), gəlir arayışı, əmlak sənədi və qiymətləndirmə hesabatı. Qərar 5-10 iş günü ərzində verilir. Daha ətraflı məlumat almaq istəyirsiniz?
I had a very bad experience at the Nizami branch, the staff were rude

I'm very sorry to hear about your experience - that's not the standard of service AccessBank aims to provide. To ensure this is properly investigated, could you tell me approximately when this occurred (date and time)?
It was yesterday afternoon around 2pm

Thank you for letting us know. I've created support case **CASE-K1L2M3N4** and escalated it to our **Customer Service** team. Your complaint about the Nizami branch on [yesterday's date] at approximately 14:00 has been logged and will be reviewed. The team will follow up with you within 1-2 business days. We take service quality very seriously and appreciate you bringing this to our attention.
Я оплатил картой, деньги списались, но оплата не прошла

Это может быть временное удержание средств - такое случается, когда транзакция не прошла, но банк уже зарезервировал сумму. Обычно деньги возвращаются автоматически в течение 3-5 рабочих дней.

Можете сообщить сумму транзакции и примерную дату и время, когда это произошло?
150 AZN, сегодня в 11:30 утром

Спасибо за информацию. Я создал обращение **CASE-P5Q6R7S8** и передал его в отдел **Card Operations**. Если сумма не вернётся в течение 3-5 рабочих дней, команда свяжется с вами. Вы также можете позвонить на *8880 для срочной помощи. Сохраните номер обращения для отслеживания.
How do I open an account with AccessBank?

Opening an AccessBank account is quick and straightforward! Here's what you need:

**For Azerbaijani citizens:** Just bring your national ID (Vin-kart) to any branch.
**For foreign nationals:** Passport + residence permit.

Account opening is **completely free** - no fees, no minimum balance. The whole process takes about 15-30 minutes. You'll get:
- A free current account in AZN
- A free debit card (ready in 3-5 business days)
- Immediate access to internet banking and the mobile app
- Option to add USD and EUR accounts

Find your nearest branch on accessbank.az or call *8880 for more information. Is there anything specific you'd like to know?

description: General 'what can you do?' opener → issue discovery

turns.content: What can you help me with?

I can help you with a wide range of AccessBank services! Here are some things I can do:

- 💳 **Cards**: answer questions about debit/credit cards, report a lost or blocked card
- 💰 **Loans & Mortgages**: explain products, help check application status
- 📲 **Mobile App & Internet Banking**: troubleshoot login issues, explain features
- 💸 **Transfers**: explain fees, report failed or missing payments
- 🏦 **Accounts & Deposits**: explain rates, help with account opening
- 📋 **Complaints**: create a case and escalate to the right team

What would you like help with today?
Actually I have a problem with a transfer
Of course - I'm here to help. Could you describe what happened with the transfer? For example: was it sent but not received, or did it fail immediately?

description: Broad product menu with smart intent suggestions

turns.content: Card

Sure. I can help with several AccessBank card topics:

1. New card order: myCard Junior, White, Black or OK card
2. Credit / loan card: limit, grace period, eligibility
3. Lost, stolen or blocked card
4. Failed card payment or money deducted
5. Card fees, limits or cashback

Which one do you need?
Kredit lazımdır

Əlbəttə. AccessBank-da ehtiyacınıza görə bir neçə kredit növü ola bilər:

- Nağd kredit: 500-50,000 AZN, 6-48 ay
- myCard kredit / kredit kartı: 10,000 AZN-dək, 50 günədək güzəşt müddəti
- Lombard krediti: qızıl girovu ilə
- Təminatlı kredit: daşınmaz əmlak girovu ilə

Sizə nağd kredit lazımdır, yoxsa girov əsasında kredit?
Вклад

Могу помочь с несколькими видами депозитов AccessBank:

- **Term Deposit**: фиксированный срок 6-24 месяца, от 50 AZN/USD
- **myGoal Deposit**: накопление на цель с пополнениями, срок до 36 месяцев
- **Instant / Flexi Deposit**: более гибкий доступ к средствам

Вам важнее максимальная ставка или возможность снимать/пополнять деньги?
What are the current cash loan conditions?

AccessBank's current cash loan terms are:

- Amount: **500-50,000 AZN**
- Term: **6-48 months**
- Annual interest: **9.5%-24%**
- Commission: **0%-3%**
- Repayment: annuity, meaning equal monthly installments
- EAPR: from **15%**

Final terms depend on income, workplace, seniority, credit history and bank review.
Can I get a loan with just my ID?

It depends on the loan type. For a standard cash loan, AccessBank usually requires an ID plus proof of official employment or income. The current cash loan requirements include Azerbaijani citizenship, age 21-65, at least 6 months at the last workplace, ID and employment certificate.

If you have gold collateral or a deposit at AccessBank, a lombard or deposit-backed loan may require fewer income documents. The bank can still request additional documents after review.
How much would I pay monthly for 3000 AZN?

The monthly payment depends on the term, interest rate and commission. AccessBank has a loan calculator where you can enter the amount, duration and interest rate to estimate the monthly payment.

Tell me the term you want, for example 12, 24 or 36 months, and I can show an approximate calculation. The final payment may differ after bank assessment and EAPR calculation.
Is the credit card grace period 55 days?

The current AccessBank page describes the myCard credit / loan card grace period as **up to 50 days**. Because grace periods depend on the statement cycle and repayment date, it is safest to check your contract in myAccess or confirm through *8880 before relying on the interest-free period.
Who can apply for myCard credit card?

For the myCard credit / loan card, AccessBank lists these basic requirements:

- Minimum age: **25**
- Identity card
- Official salary

The card limit can be up to 10,000 AZN, but final approval and limit depend on bank review, income and credit history.
Qızıl girovu ilə kredit verirsiniz?

Bəli, AccessBank-da qızıl zinət əşyalarının girovu ilə **lombard krediti** mövcuddur. Şərtlər belə göstərilir:

- Məbləğ: 200 AZN-dən 100,000 AZN-dək
- Müddət: 3-48 ay
- İllik faiz: 18%-dən başlayaraq
- Komissiya: 1%-5%, minimum 10 AZN
- Girov: qızıl zinət əşyaları

Yekun məbləğ qızılın qiymətləndirilməsindən və bankın qərarından asılıdır.
Мне нужен кредит под золото

В AccessBank есть ломбардный кредит под залог золотых изделий. Условия на сайте банка:

- Сумма: от 200 AZN до 100,000 AZN
- Срок: 3-48 месяцев
- Годовая ставка: от 18%
- Комиссия: 1%-5%, минимум 10 AZN
- Залог: золотые украшения

Окончательная сумма зависит от оценки золота и решения банка.
Can I borrow against my apartment?

AccessBank has a secured loan option backed by real estate. Current terms shown include:

- Amount: **10,000-70,000 AZN**
- Term: **12-59 months**
- Annual interest: from **18%**
- Commission: **1%**
- Collateral: real estate owned by you or a first-degree relative

The loan amount plus accrued interest should not exceed the bank's collateral ratio. The property will need assessment and legal review.
Which deposit is better if I want to add money every month?

If you plan to add money regularly, **myGoal Deposit** is usually the better fit because it is designed for growing savings toward a goal and supports increasing the amount. If you can lock funds for a fixed term, **Term Deposit** may offer clearer fixed-term income. If you need access to the money, compare **Instant Deposit** or **Flexi Deposit**.

The best option depends on whether you prefer higher fixed income or flexible access.
What is the minimum amount for a term deposit?

AccessBank's Term Deposit starts from **50 AZN or USD**. The term can be **6-24 months**, with rates shown up to **10.75% in AZN** or up to **3.5% in USD**. You can choose interest monthly or at the end of the term.

Rates can change, so confirm the exact rate before opening.
Можно получать проценты каждый месяц?

Да, для срочного депозита AccessBank указывает возможность получать проценты **ежемесячно** или **в конце срока**. Ежемесячная выплата удобна, если вам нужен регулярный доход, а выплата в конце срока подходит, если вы хотите получить проценты после завершения депозита.

Перед открытием проверьте актуальную ставку и условия договора.
Əmanəti vaxtından əvvəl bağlasam faiz qalır?

Bu, seçdiyiniz əmanət məhsulunun müqavilə şərtlərindən asılıdır. Müddətli əmanətdə vaxtından əvvəl bağlanma zamanı faiz azala və ya itirilə bilər. Daha çevik istifadə istəyirsinizsə, Instant və ya Flexi kimi məhsulları müqayisə etmək daha uyğun ola bilər.

Dəqiq şərti müqavilənizdə, myAccess-də və ya *8880 vasitəsilə yoxlamağınız yaxşıdır.
What can I do in myAccess?

myAccess lets you manage banking outside the branch, 24/7. You can manage accounts, cards, savings, loans, remittances and other transactions. It is useful for checking balances, tracking expenses, making payments, repaying loans and managing daily banking tasks.

Some identity-sensitive changes may still require *8880 or a branch.
Не приходит код для входа в myAccess

Проверьте, пожалуйста, несколько моментов:

1. Номер телефона совпадает с номером, зарегистрированным в банке
2. SMS не заблокированы на телефоне
3. Есть связь с мобильной сетью, особенно если вы в роуминге
4. Код не истёк, так как OTP действует ограниченное время

Никому не сообщайте OTP. Если номер телефона изменился, обратитесь в *8880 или в филиал для безопасного обновления данных.
I forgot my internet banking password

Use the official **Forgot Password** recovery flow in myAccess or contact *8880. For security, do not share your old password, OTP, PIN or card CVV with anyone, including in chat.

If your registered phone number is no longer active, the bank may need to verify your identity through an official channel before resetting access.
myAccess nə üçündür?

myAccess AccessBank-ın internet bankçılıq xidmətidir. Onunla 24/7 rejimində hesablarınızı, kartlarınızı, əmanətlərinizi, kreditlərinizi, pul köçürmələrini və digər əməliyyatları idarə edə bilərsiniz.

Bəzi təhlükəsizlik və şəxsiyyət təsdiqi tələb edən əməliyyatlar üçün filial və ya *8880 lazım ola bilər.
Can I pay my loan online?

Yes. AccessBank provides online loan payment options. You can check the official online loan payment service, myAccess or the mobile app. Other payment channels may include hesab.az, payment terminals, post offices and bank branches.

Keep the payment confirmation until the loan balance updates.
Money transfer

AccessBank can help with several money transfer types:

- **AccessTransfer** through the bank's branch network
- **Western Union** for international remittances
- **Zolotaya Korona** for selected country corridors
- **SWIFT** for bank-to-bank international transfers
- Domestic transfers and utility payments through digital channels

Are you sending inside Azerbaijan, abroad, or trying to track a missing transfer?
Do you have Western Union?

Yes. AccessBank lists **Western Union** among its money transfer systems. It is used for international remittances, with fees, limits, currency and payout availability depending on the destination country and current Western Union rules.

Which country are you sending to or receiving from?
Можно отправить Золотая Корона в Турцию?

AccessBank указывает **Zolotaya Korona** среди систем денежных переводов, в том числе для переводов в Турцию и другие страны. Но доступность направлений может меняться из-за правил системы и требований регуляторов.

Перед отправкой лучше уточнить актуальную возможность и комиссию в филиале или по *8880.
What is AccessBank SWIFT code?

AccessBank's SWIFT code is **ACABAZ22**. The bank code is **505000** and TIN is **1400057421**.

For correspondent bank accounts, please copy details only from the official AccessBank requisites page, because the correct route depends on the currency and can change.
I transferred money and it did not arrive

I understand. To identify the right path, please check these safe details:

1. Was it domestic, SWIFT, Western Union, Zolotaya Korona or AccessTransfer?
2. What status do you see: pending, completed, failed or reversed?
3. What was the date, amount and reference number?

Do not share card PIN, CVV, OTP or internet banking password. If the transfer is urgent, call *8880 with the reference number.
I paid my gas bill but it still shows unpaid

That can happen if the provider has not updated the bill yet or if the payment is pending. Please check the payment status and receipt in myAccess or the mobile app.

Useful safe details for support are: payment date, amount, provider, subscriber code and transaction reference. If it does not update, contact *8880 or the utility provider with the receipt.
Can I rent a safe box?

Yes. AccessBank offers deposit boxes for residents of Azerbaijan, including individuals and legal entities. They are intended for safe storage of money, jewelry and important documents. The boxes use a modern protection system, two-key locking and confidential contents.

Availability can differ by branch, so please confirm the branch, box size and tariff through *8880 before visiting.
How much are deposit boxes?

AccessBank's deposit box tariff table shows monthly prices from **30 AZN to 90 AZN**, 6-month prices from **150 AZN to 450 AZN**, and 12-month prices from **300 AZN to 900 AZN**, depending on box size.

Please confirm availability and the latest tariff with the branch or *8880 before renting.
How many branches do you have?

AccessBank's current service network page shows **40 branches**, **52 ATMs** and **1 department**. The network covers Baku, Absheron and many regions of Azerbaijan.

For the exact address, working hours and available services, use the official branch locator or call *8880.
Ən yaxın filialı necə tapa bilərəm?

Ən yaxın AccessBank filialını və ya ATM-i rəsmi accessbank.az saytındakı xidmət şəbəkəsi bölməsindən tapa bilərsiniz. Orada filialların ünvanları, regionlar və ATM-lər göstərilir.

Dəqiq iş saatı və xidmət mövcudluğunu getməzdən əvvəl *8880 vasitəsilə dəqiqləşdirməyiniz yaxşıdır.
I disagree with the bank's response to my complaint

You can resubmit your appeal to AccessBank through the official complaint channels. If you still disagree with the response, you may apply to the Central Bank of Azerbaijan.

Keep your complaint reference number, dates, copies of documents and any written response from the bank.
The staff at a branch treated me badly

I'm sorry that happened. AccessBank complaints can be submitted through a branch/head office, hotline, written mail, email/contact form, or official appeal channel.

For a useful complaint, include safe details: branch name, date, approximate time, what happened, and any reference number. Do not include PIN, CVV, OTP or passwords.
Мне позвонили и попросили код из SMS от имени банка

Не сообщайте SMS-код. OTP, PIN, CVV и пароль от интернет-банка нельзя передавать никому, даже если человек представляется сотрудником банка.

Если вы уже сообщили код или видите подозрительную операцию, сразу заблокируйте карту в приложении, если это возможно, и позвоните на *8880.
There is a transaction I did not make

Please act quickly:

1. Block the card in the app if available, or call *8880 immediately
2. Do not share OTP, PIN, CVV or password
3. Save the transaction details, merchant name, date, time and amount
4. File a dispute through the bank's official channel

Is the card still with you, or do you think it was lost or stolen?
I need financing for my small business

AccessBank has a strong focus on micro and small business clients. To route you correctly, the bank would usually need to understand:

- Business activity and region
- How long the business has operated
- Approximate monthly turnover
- Requested amount and purpose
- Whether collateral is available

For exact SME loan terms, it is best to consult a branch or business banking specialist.
What do I need to open a company account?

For a business account, requirements depend on whether you are an individual entrepreneur or legal entity. Usually, the bank will need identification and business registration documents, and may request ownership, tax and compliance information.

Because business requirements vary, check the official business banking documents or visit a branch with your company papers.
Can I get a POS terminal for my shop?

AccessBank can route merchant service questions through business banking. To prepare, have these details ready: business type, shop location, expected monthly turnover, whether you need physical POS or online payment acceptance, and company registration details.

Exact POS tariffs and setup conditions should be confirmed with the bank's business team.
Mənə zəng edib OTP kod istədilər

OTP kodu heç kimə deməyin. Bank əməkdaşı belə sizdən OTP, PIN, CVV və internet bank parolunu istəməməlidir.

Əgər kodu artıq paylaşmısınızsa və ya şübhəli əməliyyat görürsünüzsə, kartı dərhal tətbiqdən bloklayın və *8880 ilə əlaqə saxlayın.
Сколько у вас отделений и банкоматов?

На странице сервисной сети AccessBank указано **40 филиалов**, **52 банкомата** и **1 отдел**. Сеть охватывает Баку, Абшерон и регионы Азербайджана.

Для точного адреса, графика и доступных услуг проверьте официальный сайт или позвоните на *8880.
Where can I find all official fees?

Use AccessBank's **Tariffs and documents** page. It contains official terms and conditions for individual and business services, plus payment services information forms.

For fees, rates, EAPR/FIFD and contract terms, always use the latest document version or confirm through *8880.
